case_title: BAKER WINSTON VS JANITORIAL ASSOCIATES INC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,900.00 FILED BY BAKER WINSTON AS TO DEFENDANT JANITORIAL ASSOCIATES INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-09-1990 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
